mapper.insert: INSERT INTO warning_history (car_id, area_name, x, y, gas_type, gas_value, warning_time) VALUES (#{carId}, #{areaName}, #{x}, #{y}, #{gasType}, #{gasValue}, #{warningTime})
mapper.select: SELECT id, car_id as carId, area_name as areaName, x, y, gas_type as gasType, gas_value as gasValue, warning_time as warningTime FROM warning_history
